'''Nig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] who is a member of the [[Raptors (gang)|Raptor gang]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he stole a green hair along with the other gang members when they encountered [[Darsha Assant]]. She pulled her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and [[Mission to the Crimson Corridor|engaged]] the gang when Nig attacked her with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|Vibroblade]] until the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Cho sun/Legends|cut]] the Gotal's hand.

==Appearances==
